name: com.gameframex.unity.download
description:
GameFrameX Download — Unity multi-agent download manager package. Handles concurrent file downloads with priority queuing, configurable agent pools, pause/resume support, real-time speed reporting, timeout settings, and event-driven callbacks for start/update/success/failure. Docs: https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com

GameFrameX Download — Unity 多代理下载管理功能包。处理并发文件下载，支持优先级队列、可配置代理池、暂停/恢复、实时速度上报、超时设置，以及开始/更新/成功/失败的事件驱动回调。文档：https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com
